{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Jai clan Goldsign
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Goldsign]] of the [[Jai clan]] consists of metal wire appearing as white hair.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
